title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAMES OF CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PANABO, PROVINCE OF DAVAO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3217 / 57 OG No. 7, 1194 (February 13, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2800, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAMES OF CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PANABO, PROVINCE OF DAVAO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The names of the following barrios in the Municipality of Panabo, Province of Davao, are changed as follows:

Barrio Bincungan to Barrio Guadalupe; and

Barrio Tagurot to Barrio San Nicolas.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
